'''鈭歜-w-h''' ('''kabawah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zone|zone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zone|zone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-w-h
|-
! Lemma
| kabawah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibawah|thibawah]] || [[word:jibawah|jibawah]] || [[word:shibawah|shibawah]] || [[word:kibawah|kibawah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubawah|thuthubawah]] || [[word:jujubawah|jujubawah]] || [[word:shushubawah|shushubawah]] || [[word:kukubawah|kukubawah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubawah|thubawah]] || [[word:jubawah|jubawah]] || [[word:shubawah|shubawah]] || [[word:kubawah|kubawah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubawah|thubawah]] || [[word:jubawah|jubawah]] || [[word:shubawah|shubawah]] || [[word:kubawah|kubawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebawah|thebawah]] || [[word:jebawah|jebawah]] || [[word:shebawah|shebawah]] || [[word:kebawah|kebawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobawah|thothobawah]] || [[word:jojobawah|jojobawah]] || [[word:shoshobawah|shoshobawah]] || [[word:kokobawah|kokobawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobawah|thobawah]] || [[word:jobawah|jobawah]] || [[word:shobawah|shobawah]] || [[word:kobawah|kobawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobawah|thobawah]] || [[word:jobawah|jobawah]] || [[word:shobawah|shobawah]] || [[word:kobawah|kobawah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]] || [[word:bawah|bawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bawah|th忙bawah]] || [[word:j忙bawah|j忙bawah]] || [[word:sh忙bawah|sh忙bawah]] || [[word:k忙bawah|k忙bawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabawah|thathabawah]] || [[word:jajabawah|jajabawah]] || [[word:shashabawah|shashabawah]] || [[word:kakabawah|kakabawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabawah|thabawah]] || [[word:jabawah|jabawah]] || [[word:shabawah|shabawah]] || [[word:kabawah|kabawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabawah|thabawah]] || [[word:jabawah|jabawah]] || [[word:shabawah|shabawah]] || [[word:kabawah|kabawah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabawah|shabawah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabawah|goshabawah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabawah|gokishabawah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabawahn眉|shabawahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabawahnkn眉|goshabawahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawahn眉|gokishabawahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabawahsh毛|shabawahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabawahnksh毛|goshabawahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabawahsh毛|gokishabawahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawahro|shabawahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawahnkro|goshabawahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawahro|gokishabawahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawahmu|shabawahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawahnkmu|goshabawahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawahmu|gokishabawahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabawahsher|shabawahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabawahnksher|goshabawahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabawahsher|gokishabawahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabawahng|shabawahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabawahnkng|goshabawahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabawahng|gokishabawahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabawahya|shabawahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabawahnkya|goshabawahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabawahya|gokishabawahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabawahyam|shabawahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabawahnkyam|goshabawahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabawahyam|gokishabawahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabawahn眉sh毛|shabawahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabawahnkn眉sh毛|goshabawahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabawahn眉sh毛|gokishabawahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawahn眉ro|shabawahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawahnkn眉ro|goshabawahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawahn眉ro|gokishabawahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawahn眉mu|shabawahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawahnkn眉mu|goshabawahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawahn眉mu|gokishabawahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabawahsh毛n眉|shabawahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabawahnksh毛n眉|goshabawahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawahsh毛n眉|gokishabawahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawahsh毛ro|shabawahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawahnksh毛ro|goshabawahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawahsh毛ro|gokishabawahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawahsh毛mu|shabawahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawahnksh毛mu|goshabawahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawahsh毛mu|gokishabawahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabawahron眉|shabawahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabawahnkron眉|goshabawahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawahron眉|gokishabawahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabawahrosh毛|shabawahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabawahnkrosh毛|goshabawahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabawahrosh毛|gokishabawahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawahromu|shabawahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawahnkromu|goshabawahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawahromu|gokishabawahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabawahmun眉|shabawahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabawahnkmun眉|goshabawahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawahmun眉|gokishabawahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabawahmush毛|shabawahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabawahnkmush毛|goshabawahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabawahmush毛|gokishabawahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawahmuro|shabawahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawahnkmuro|goshabawahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawahmuro|gokishabawahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
